overall.description: First-person gameplay footage of a character walking through a dark forest trail at night using a flashlight. The scene progresses from a rocky outcrop into dense woodland, passing a wooden barrier, with atmospheric low lighting typical of survival horror or exploration games.

events.description: rock wall on right side disappears as path enters denser forest section

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path, flashlight illuminating the rocky wall and surrounding trees

entered.detail: large rocky outcrop forming a wall along the right side of the path
thick tree trunk visible on the left side of the frame
uneven dirt trail with scattered rocks and leaves
tall pine trees forming the left forest boundary
tall pine trees forming the right forest boundary
dense low vegetation and bushes on the left side of the path
dense low vegetation and bushes on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with a first-person view walking along a narrow forest trail at night, flashlight revealing a large rock wall on the right and dense trees ahead. The rocky terrain gradually gives way to uniform forest as the camera moves forward through the enclosed, dark woodland path.

agents.ego_description: continuing along the forest path, navigating the uneven terrain illuminated by flashlight

segments.scene_description: Walking through a consistently dense forest section with tall trees flanking both sides of the narrow dirt path. The environment is uniformly dark with only the path ahead illuminated, creating an enclosed and isolated atmosphere.

events.description: wooden barrier or fence appears on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: walking past a wooden barrier on the left side while continuing along the forest trail

entered.detail: low wooden fence or barrier with red-orange coloring on the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: The path continues through dense forest with a brief glimpse of sky visible ahead. A wooden barrier appears on the left side of the trail, which the camera passes as it maintains a steady walking pace through the dark woodland.

agents.ego_description: proceeding deeper into the forest, navigating around a small tree on the left side of the path

entered.detail: small thin tree with sparse foliage growing close to the left edge of the path

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues through increasingly dark forest as the wooden barrier falls behind. A small tree appears on the left side of the path, and the surroundings become darker and more enclosed as the trail progresses deeper into the woodland.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey along a narrow forest trail that transitions from a rocky outcrop into an increasingly enclosed and oppressive woodland. It begins by moving past a large rock wall on the right, with the flashlight cutting through the dark as the rocky terrain gradually gives way to a uniform forest of tall trees. As the camera pushes deeper into the isolated atmosphere, the path remains tightly flanked by dense foliage before a wooden barrier appears and passes on the left. The scene then shifts toward a more claustrophobic environment, passing a small tree as the glimpse of sky vanishes. Finally, the surroundings become darker and more enclosed, pulling the viewer deeper into the heart of the woodland.
